description: Update specified RFIs in a specified project. Specify the RFIs by their IDs. Pass in the same values for each specified RFI for the action to succeed.

parameters.name: run_configurable_validations
parameters.description: If true, validations are run for the corresponding Configurable Field Set.

add_assignee_ids.description: Array of Assignee IDs to add to the Assignees List

add_required_assignee_ids.description: Array of Assignee IDs to make required in the Assignees List.  Note: The Assignee must also be in the Assignees List to be marked as required.

remove_assignee_ids.description: Array of Assignee IDs to remove from the Assignees List

add_distribution_ids.description: Array of Distribution Member IDs to add to the Distribution List

remove_distribution_ids.description: Array of Distribution Member IDs to remove from the Distribution List

cost_code_id.description: The ID of the Cost Code of the RFI

cost_impact.description: The Cost Impact of the RFI

drawing_number.description: The Drawing Number of the RFI

due_date.description:
The Due Date of the RFI
*Only admin users can set this field

location_id.description: The ID of the Location of the RFI

private.description: The Private status of the RFI

received_from_login_information_id.description: The ID of the Received From User of the RFI

responsible_contractor_id.description: The ID of the Responsible Contractor Vendor of the RFI

rfi_manager_id.description: The ID of the RFI Manager User of the RFI *Only admin users (or standard users, if the project's configuration allows for it) can set this field

schedule_impact.description: The Schedule Impact of the RFI

specification_section_id.description: The ID of the Specification Section of the RFI

sub_job_id.description: The ID of the Sub Job of the RFI
